files.content:
# Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH database scaffold
#
# Required PVs:
# - POS_RBV
# - MOVE_PLUS
# - MOVE_MINUS
# - STOP
# - SPEED_RBV
#
# Notes:
# - This DB expects StreamDevice with phytron.proto loaded by the IOC.
# - The PORT macro must match the asyn IP port configured in st.cmd.
# - Address handling is currently embedded in the protocol payloads and must be
#   verified during commissioning.

record(ai, "$(P)POS_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "Phytron position readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getPosition $(PORT)")
    field(PREC, "0")
    field(SCAN, "1 second")
}

record(ai, "$(P)SPEED_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "Phytron speed readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getSpeed $(PORT)")
    field(PREC, "0")
    field(SCAN, "2 second")
}

record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_PLUS") {
    field(DESC, "Phytron jog plus")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto movePlus $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Move+")
}

record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_MINUS") {
    field(DESC, "Phytron jog minus")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto moveMinus $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Move-")
}

record(bo, "$(P)STOP") {
    field(DESC, "Phytron stop motion")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto stopMotion $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Stop")
}

#!../../bin/linux-x86_64/phytronIOC
# Startup script for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH IOC scaffold
#
# Commissioning notes:
# - Verified TCP port is 22222.
# - StreamDevice protocol file uses framed packets with STX/ETX.
# - Verified command bytes currently only support the framed style and one
#   observed request candidate for getPosition.
# - MCC-1 address handling must be checked during bring-up.
#   The current protocol payloads use address '0' because that was observed
#   working, while a previous address '1' configuration failed.
# - Keep asyn trace enabled initially to compare sent/received bytes.

< envPaths

cd "${TOP}"

dbLoadDatabase "dbd/phytronIOC.dbd"
phytronIOC_registerRecordDeviceDriver pdbbase

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# User-configurable macros for commissioning
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
epicsEnvSet("P", "PHYTRON:")
epicsEnvSet("PORT", "MCC1")
epicsEnvSet("HOST", "127.0.0.1")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# asyn TCP/IP port configuration
# Verified controller TCP port: 22222
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
drvAsynIPPortConfigure("$(PORT)", "$(HOST):22222", 0, 0, 0)

# Optional asyn diagnostics for bring-up and packet verification
asynSetTraceMask("$(PORT)", -1, 0x9)
asynSetTraceIOMask("$(PORT)", -1, 0x2)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load records
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
dbLoadRecords("db/phytron.db", "P=$(P),PORT=$(PORT)")

cd "${TOP}/iocBoot/${IOC}"
iocInit
